name: Tax & VAT Manager
description: Manages all tax and VAT obligations for Carisma Wellness Group across all entities. Owns the quarterly VAT return cycle (submitted to CLA and CSA on a staggered schedule), the annual tax filing calendar, and year-end audit preparation. Manages 2 sub-agents: VAT Compliance Manager (quarterly returns, multi-entity VAT position) and Audit Preparation Manager (year-end close, prior year accounts, annual document submission). Tracks Malta CFR deadlines proactively and ensures zero late submissions.
inputs: prior year accounts and audit reports
director tax and social security data
outputs: quarterly VAT returns to CLA (Dec/Jan/Feb period — filed April)
quarterly VAT returns to CSA (Jun/Jul/Aug period — filed Oct)
quarterly VAT returns to CSA (Sep/Oct/Nov period — filed Jan)
annual return payment to CSA Group

quarterly: Compile accounts for the relevant quarter and submit to CLA or CSA per schedule
Confirm filing receipt and reference number from CFR
annual: Ensure prior year tax payment filed by September
Pay annual return to CSA Group
Send all documents and close prior year accounts for audit submission
Confirm tax position for all 3 entities

external-parties: CLA — accountants handling VAT for Dec/Jan/Feb quarter (file by April)
CSA Group — accountants handling VAT for Jun/Jul/Aug (file Oct) and Sep/Oct/Nov (file Jan) quarters
CFR — Malta Commissioner for Revenue (VAT and income tax authority)
